Feature Request: Custom Tap and Hold Delay Settings

Workaround(s): Use default dark grey/smart invert theme
Use native screenshot on tablet, or use exceprt as screenshot
Use lasso tool to move content down
Use Cut/Copy and paste or reselect

Feature Request: Include Add to Existing Note to Import Interface
Workaround(s): Import and add to note separately
Use default browser in split screen/floating window
Screenshot from external web math editors
Store drawing templates in dedicated notebook and copy as needed

Feature Request: Free 360 Rotation of Note while Writing
Workaround(s): Turn tablet to suit writing angle
Use system split/floating screen with calc app or physical calculator
Draw circle shape and erase a section to form an arc
Use double tap gesture set to paper adaptive
Hide note bar and use full screen mode with pen case

Feature Request: Customizable Shortcut in Tap and Hold Menu
Floating Shape Toolbox/Add Shapes to Pen Case

Workaround(s): Search keywords separately or use tags
Use external pdf cropping tool like PDF24Tools

Feature Request: Apple Pencil Pro Squeeze Gesture Support
Synced Audio Playback for Multiple Audios
